claim: Claude Fable 5 is double the price of Opus 4.8 but less than half the price of the Claude Mythos Preview due to more efficient inference infrastructure deals
actionable: When selecting models, evaluate Fable 5 for high-capability tasks where cost-per-inference efficiency matters more than raw speed

claim: Fable 5 has safety classifiers that aggressively block cybersecurity, biology, and malware queries - even simple disease questions trigger model switching to Opus
actionable: When using Fable 5, expect frequent safety-triggered model switches for biology/security topics; design fallbacks to less-restricted models

claim: Anthropic requires 30-day data retention for Mythos-class models on first and third-party platforms, marking a policy change that may affect privacy-sensitive use cases
actionable: For Mythos models, account for 30-day data retention in compliance and data governance strategies
